text.text: Welcome to the Betweenlands Tinker Encyclopedia!
This guide covers all the new tools and materials added by this mod.

Using the Animator, you can convert Tinkers' tools into four powerful Betweenlands variants: the Pickaxe, Shovel, Hatchet, and Broadsword. They retain all original stats and are immune to the Betweenlands weakness.

You can also convert Tinkers' parts (Tool Rods, Bindings, and Heads) into their Betweenlands equivalents. These parts are only for replacing components in existing Betweenlands tools—they cannot craft tools directly.
Enjoy your journey through the swamps!
